issues.detail: The instructions lack coverage of error scenarios and edge cases.

scenarios.name: Reusable VPC ComponentResource
scenarios.rationale: Baseline implements the VPC as a plain function returning resources without extending pulumi.ComponentResource or registering outputs, while the treatment subclasses ComponentResource, parents child resources, and exposes outputs for cross-stack consumption.

scenarios.name: Per-environment config with secrets
scenarios.rationale: Baseline creates dev/staging/prod stacks but stores the database password with plain pulumi config set instead of pulumi config set --secret, whereas the treatment uses --secret for every stack and reads it via requireSecret in code.
